JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. PLTF'S COUNSEL PRESENT. DEFT PRESENT AND IN PRO PER. IN LIMINE MOTIONS DISCUSSED. TRIAL CONT'D TO 4/9/96 AT 9:30 AM.

JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. JOHN WEINSTEIN APPEARING FOR PLTFS. DEFT APPEARING IN PRO PER. ROLL CALL OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS MADE AND ATTENDANCE MARKED. VOIR DIRE OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS PASS FOR CAUSE, PEREMPTORIES MADE. 12 JURORS SWORN, 2 ALTERNATES SWORN. WITNESSES SWORN & EXAMINED, EXHIBIT INTRODUCED & ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE. PLTF. REST. DEFT COMMENCES CASE BUT REFUSED TO CONTINUE PUTTING CASE IN CHIEF. PLTF. MOVED FOR JUDGMENT FOR PLTF, FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES. COURT GRANTED MOTION. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. JURY DISCHARGED, THANKED AND EXCUSED. COURT ADJOURNED.

FOR COSTS OF SUIT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
